title: Minions & Monsters
synopsis: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

title: Toy Story 5
synopsis: Woody, Buzz, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they're introduced to electronics, a new threat to playtime.

title: Alpha
synopsis: Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge-of-the-seat, thrilling ride.

title: Welcome to the Jungle
synopsis: Welcome to the Jungle is a comedy-action adventure where a group of quirky characters gets stuck in a dangerous jungle during a chaotic mission. Filled with confusion, criminals, and hilarious situations, they must work together to survive and find their way out.

title: Supergirl
synopsis: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

title: Sakr w Canaria
synopsis: Saqr, a legendary mercenary decides to leave his dangerous double life behind and start fresh. But an unexpected encounter with Bilal, a failed writer obsessed with the world of espionage, turns his plans upside down. The unlikely duo find themselves thrown into a thrilling yet hilarious ride that changes everything - unlike anything they’ve ever known.

title: Obsession
synopsis: A bold new voice in horror. After breaking the mysterious “One Wish Willow” to win his crush’s heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.

title: Balan - The Boy
synopsis: A woman walks out of prison with her young son and a past she'll do anything to hide. When their wandering leads them to an unlikely refuge, peace begins to feel possible; until it isn't. Years later, the boy comes back looking for answers.

title: Backrooms
synopsis: After a therapist's patient disappears into a dimension beyond reality, she must venture into the unknown to save him.

title: Love, Ngo
synopsis: When Ngongo, a young man with a cleft lip, meets Scarlet, the first woman he truly loves, he dares to dream of a life beyond his insecurities. Her family sees only his condition, and he must learn that true acceptance begins with loving himself.

title: Gatta Kusthi 2
synopsis: Veera proudly cares for his family while supporting his wife Keerthy's wrestling career. When misunderstandings, social judgment and an unexpected incident threaten their home, he must fight for his family's love and trust.

title: Nagabandham
synopsis: A captivating exploration of India's ancient Vishnu temples, delving into the enigmatic ritual of Nagabandham and the hidden mysteries and sacred traditions surrounding it.

title: Baby Do Die Do
synopsis: Baby Do Die Do follows Baby KarMarKar, India's first desi hitwoman. A deaf-mute assassin navigating Mumbai's underworld, she faces a dangerous world of secrets, violence and unexpected twists.

title: Nagabandham
synopsis: A captivating exploration of India's ancient Vishnu temples, delving into the enigmatic ritual of Nagabandham and the hidden mysteries and sacred traditions surrounding it.

title: Nagabandham
synopsis: A captivating exploration of India's ancient Vishnu temples, delving into the enigmatic ritual of Nagabandham and the hidden mysteries and sacred traditions surrounding it.

title: Mind Trap
synopsis: Two couples unknowingly double-book a countryside mansion, leading to strange occurrences and intense psychological games.

title: The Furious
synopsis: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and corrupt police refuse to help, he sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wife has mysteriously disappeared. Fueled by vengeance, the unlikely duo fights the kidnappers in an explosive martial arts showdown.

title: Couture
synopsis: An American filmmaker faces challenges and self-discovery as she arrives in Paris for Fashion Week on a life-and-death journey.

title: Lockbox
synopsis: A woman puts everything on the line to defend her enigmatic cousin from a dangerous otherworldly entity determined to track him down.

title: Keeper
synopsis: Terrifying visions plague a free-spirited artist during a romantic anniversary trip to a secluded cabin with the doctor she has been dating for a year.

title: Siccin 9
synopsis: An ancient curse awakened by a mother's scream has waited in silence for decades. When her grandson crosses the threshold of his father's home, the cycle of darkness begins anew.

title: Minions & Monsters
synopsis: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.

title: Carry on Jatta 4
synopsis: Carry On Jatta 4 continues the legacy of one of Punjabi cinema’s most loved comedy franchises, bringing back chaos, confusion, and a house full of lies that spiral hilariously out of control.

title: Ananthan Kaadu
synopsis: In a time of political upheaval and mounting conflict, authority, defiance and endurance collide, and every decision deeply affects the characters' destinies.

title: Hungry
synopsis: A group of holidaymakers on a Louisiana bayou tour find themselves stranded in dangerous swamplands when they become the prey of a ferocious rampaging hippopotamus. As survival turns into a brutal fight against nature and fear, the group must work together to escape before becoming the creature’s next victims.

title: Chinna Chinna Aasai
synopsis: On the enchanting shores of Varanasi, two souls meet by chance. Somewhere within this unfolding chaos, an unspoken bond begins to form, slowly slipping beyond friendship.

title: Black Box
synopsis: Vero Airlines Flight 298 from New Orleans to Seattle becomes the center of a chilling supernatural mystery.

title: Maa Inti Bangaram
synopsis: Through both her moments of fear and bravery, a woman discovers that embracing her vulnerabilities is as vital to her inner strength as facing challenges head-on.

title: Cocktail 2
synopsis: Exploring modern relationships amid emotional turmoil, this sequel features new characters facing current challenges while revisiting themes of love, friendship, and heartbreak.

title: Ezma
synopsis: The story begins when Issa receives a box on the night of his birthday from his old friend Sera. Inside the box are videotapes he left for himself 18 years earlier. In the recordings, the younger Issa explains a game called “Ezma,” which consists of a series of instructions leading to symbolic treasures designed to help him rediscover himself if he ever loses his way over time. Issa decides to follow the steps of the game with his friend Sera by his side. With every clue he solves, he is forced to confront his past and his deepest fears, while gradually reconnecting with his long-lost passion for filmmaking. Throughout this journey, Issa moves closer to fulfilling his dream of directing a documentary that creates a dialogue between his past and present, ultimately leading him to rediscover himself and understand the true meaning of love.

title: Main Vaapas Aaunga
synopsis: A story of love, longing, and belonging rooted in Partition-era migration. Examines memory, nostalgia, and emotional ties to home and loved ones, exploring how the past shapes identity and sustains the human spirit across generations.

title: The Crush
synopsis: Omar, a shy and old-fashioned accountant in his thirties, lives with his charming bachelor uncle, Fouad. When Fouad partners with the confident Mai to market her beach resort, he brings Omar along, secretly hoping to set them up and spark romance. But with Mai’s meddling mother, a possessive ex, and a chaotic belly dancer in the mix, things don’t go as planned. As Omar is pushed out of his comfort zone, both he and Fouad are forced to confront what they really want from love, and from life.

title: Disclosure Day
synopsis: If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. We are coming close to … Disclosure Day.

title: Masters of the Universe
synopsis: In MASTERS OF THE UNIVERSE, Director Travis Knight brings the legendary franchise back to the big screen in this epic live-action adventure. After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam (Nicholas Galitzine) back to Eternia where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor (Jared Leto). To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela (Camila Mendes) and Duncan/Man-At-Arms (Idris Elba), and embrace his true destiny as He-Man, the most powerful man in the universe.

title: 7 Dogs
synopsis: From the Directors of Bad Boys and the stunt team of John Wick, 7 Dogs follows elite Interpol officer Khalid Al-Azzazi after he successfully captures Ghali Abu Dawood, a senior member of a covert global crime syndicate known as “7 Dogs.” When the organization resurfaces a year later, trafficking a powerful new drug called Pink Lady across the Middle East, Khalid is forced into an uneasy alliance with Ghali who holds the key to dismantling the network from within. Their covert mission spans multiple international cities, forging a volatile partnership driven by intelligence, rivalry, and survival.

title: El Kalam Ala Eh (Awel Leila)
synopsis: In a social comedy, four couples from wildly different backgrounds step into their wedding night, and everything quickly goes off the rails. Between society’s judgment, zero sex education, and a sudden fear of responsibility, each couple faces their own hilarious disasters. Will these disasters get solved with force, with love… or just a good laugh?

title: The Sheep Detectives
synopsis: In this witty, new breed of mystery, George (Hugh Jackman) is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can’t possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realise they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
synopsis: Follows Miranda Priestly's struggle against Emily Charlton, her former assistant turned rival executive, as they compete for advertising revenue amidst declining print media while Miranda nears retirement.

title: Deep Water
synopsis: A flight en route from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in the shark-infested Pacific after a catastrophic fire. The survivors must work together if they hope to escape the sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

title: Goat
synopsis: From Sony Pictures Animation, the studio behind Spider-ManTM: Across the Spider-Verse and the artists that made KPop Demon Hunters, comes GOAT, an original action-comedy set in an all-animal world. The story follows Will, a small goat with big dreams who gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world. Will’s new teammates aren’t thrilled about having a little goat on their roster, but Will is determined to revolutionize the sport and prove once and for all that “smalls can ball!”

title: Michael
synopsis: Michael is the cinematic portrayal of the life and legacy of one of the most influential artists the world has ever known. The film tells the story of Michael Jackson’s life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world.
